workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and language MUST be tailored to {user_skill_level}
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps
This workflow finalizes story implementation - NO code implementation

step.action: Determine story_key from parameter or auto-discover

check.output:
❌ Error: No dev sessions found
No active dev sessions in {{dev_session_root}}.
Please create a dev session first by running: `/bmad-bmm-dev-story-analyze --story-file=`

check.action: Use most recently modified dev session (by session.yaml last_updated)
check.output: Using most recent dev session: {{story_key}}

step.action: Load session file: {{session_file}}
Parse session.yaml to extract: - story_key - story_path - story_title - current_task - total_tasks - status

check.output:
⚠️ Warning: Session status is "{{status}}"
Expected status: "in-progress" or "analyzed"
**Would you like to:** 1. Continue anyway (may re-complete already completed story) 2. Cancel and verify session status
Proceeding with completion...

Cancelling. Please verify session status.
Run `/bmad-bmm-dev-session-status` to see session details.

step.action: Load plan file: {{plan_file}}

check.output:
❌ Error: Implementation plan not found
Plan file expected at: {{plan_file}}

step.action: Load context handoff file: {{context_handoff_file}}

check.output: ⚠️ Warning: Context handoff file not found at {{context_handoff_file}}

step.action: Read all progress files matching pattern: {{progress_files_pattern}}
List all found progress files (progress-1.md, progress-2.md, etc.)
Calculate how many tasks have been completed (count of progress files)
Load verification file: {{verification_file}}

check.action: Extract verification results (test, lint, build status)

check.output:
⚠️ Warning: No verification file found
Verification should be run before completion.
**Would you like to:** 1. Continue without verification (not recommended) 2. Cancel and run verification first
⚠️ Continuing without verification (not recommended)

Cancelling. Please run verification first.
Use `/bmad-bmm-dev-story-verify` to verify the implementation.

step.action: Load story file: {{story_file}}

check.output:
❌ Error: Original story file not found
Story expected at: {{story_file}}

step.action: Parse story file sections: - Story - Acceptance Criteria - Tasks / Subtasks - File List - Status - Dev Notes

step.critical: Update the story file to mark all tasks as done and update file list
step.action: Aggregate all files created/modified from all progress files
Build comprehensive file list with descriptions
Update story file: {{story_file}}
Update Status section:
Update Tasks / Subtasks section - mark all completed:
Update File List section with all created/modified files:
Load sprint status file: {{sprint_status_file}}

check.output:
⚠️ Warning: Sprint status file not found
Sprint status expected at: {{sprint_status_file}}
Story file will be marked as done, but sprint status will not be updated.
**Would you like to:** 1. Continue without sprint status update 2. Cancel and create sprint status file first
Continuing without sprint status update...

Cancelling. Please create sprint status file first.
Use `/bmad-bmm-sprint-planning` to create sprint status.

step.action: Parse sprint-status.yaml to find story {{story_key}}

check.if: story {{story_key}} is NOT found in sprint-status.yaml
check.output:
⚠️ Warning: Story {{story_key}} not found in sprint-status.yaml
Story file will be marked as done, but sprint status will not be updated.
**Would you like to:** 1. Continue without sprint status update 2. Cancel and verify sprint status
Continuing without sprint status update...

Cancelling. Please verify sprint status.
Use `/bmad-bmm-sprint-status` to view current sprint status.

step.action: Update story status in sprint-status.yaml:

step.critical: Archive the dev session to preserve work history
step.action: Create archive directory: {{archived_session_path}}

check.output: ❌ Error: Cannot create archive directory

step.action: Create archive summary file: {{archived_session_path}}/archive-summary.md
Delete original session directory: {{dev_session_root}}/{{story_key}}
Verify all actions completed: - Story file updated (status=done, tasks marked complete, file list updated) - Sprint status updated (if applicable) - Dev session archived

check.output:
❌ Error: Completion process encountered errors
Some actions did not complete successfully.
Review the output above and manually fix any issues.

step.action: Ask user if they want to view the updated story file

check.if: user wants to view story file
